REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (378 Franconia Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Clayton Yong (Petitioner)

The sale was confirmed at $1,234,567.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on April 12, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Clayton Yong.

The Court stated that the signatures are very different from the signature on the will to the signature of the attestation with respect to Witness Ruiz. Mr. Der stated that pursuant to Probate Code 8220 they only need one subscribing Witness to approve the will, that Zuniga's signature is very similar, that he has no explanation as to why the signature is in this way. Mr. Der also stated that the Paralegal spoke with both of the Witnesses, that they called the UPS store where they were at and that he has no explanation as to why Witness Ruiz started to sign and then stopped. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
